title: Add authfile param to commit
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Added the missing --authfile to show the file location of the credentials as stored by podman login to the commit command.  While doing so noted we still had a number of 'kpod login' references in the man pages and have converted them to 'podman login'

comments.body: This should address #402.  I mistakenly thought 402 was about buildah bud, not buildah commit.
Ugh, someday I'll stay away from the close button on a commit.

:pushpin: Commit fc7ca17 has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan fc7ca172d410141524391a0a00d4dbe010cc628d -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
